# Firewall Zone (Data Source)

Data source for UniFi firewall zones (zone-based firewall, UniFi Network 8.x+). Use this to look up zone IDs by name for use in `unifi_firewall_policy` resources.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The display name of the firewall zone (e.g. `Internal`, `External`).

### Optional

- `site` (String) The name of the UniFi site.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the firewall zone.
- `network_ids` (List of String) List of network IDs assigned to this zone.
- `zone_key` (String) The internal key of the zone (e.g. `lan`, `wan`).
